2605.30038.title: Alignment-Guided Score Matching for Text-to-Image Alignment in Diffusion Models
2605.30038.paper_summary: Diffusion models generate highly realistic images but often struggle with precise text-image alignment. While recent post-training methods improve alignment using external rewards or human preference signals, their performance heavily depends on reward quality and does not directly address alignment within the diffusion process itself. Recent reward-free approaches such as SoftREPA demonstrate that optimizing soft text tokens via contrastive learning can effectively improve text-image representation alignment, outperforming standard parameter-efficient fine-tuning baselines. However, the contrastive formulation can excessively penalize negative pairs, which manifests as characteristic failure cases such as over-counting and repetition. To address this issue, we propose a lightweight, reward-free post-training method that refines soft tokens by integrating contrastive alignment guidance directly into the score-matching objective of diffusion models. By assigning alignment directions at the score level, our approach mitigates these limitations and yields more coherent and semantically faithful generations. Experiments show that our method matches SoftREPA while substantially improving its failure cases, achieving over 35% improvement in counting accuracy on the GenEval benchmark. Our method is seamlessly applicable to existing diffusion backbones (SD1.5, SDXL, and SD3), and is complementary to existing RL-based diffusion post-training methods. Project page: https://jaayeon.github.io/AGSM
2605.30038.paper_summary_zh: 擴散模型生成高度真實的影像，但常常在精確的文本-影像對齊上遇到困難。雖然最近的後訓練方法通過使用外部獎勵或人類偏好信號來改善對齊，但它們的表現在很大程度上依賴於獎勵質量，並未直接解決擴散過程中的對齊問題。最近的無獎勵方法如SoftREPA顯示，通過對比學習優化軟文本標記可以有效改善文本-影像表示對齊，超越標準的參數高效微調基準。然而，對比公式可能會過度懲罰負樣本，這表現為特徵性失敗案例，如過度計數和重複。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種輕量級的無獎勵後訓練方法，通過將對比對齊指導直接整合到擴散模型的分數匹配目標中來精煉軟標記。通過在分數層面分配對齊方向，我們的方法減輕了這些限制，並產生了更連貫且語義忠實的生成結果。實驗顯示，我們的方法與SoftREPA相匹配，同時顯著改善了其失敗案例，在GenEval基準上實現了超過35%的計數準確率提升。我們的方法可以無縫應用於現有的擴散骨幹（SD1.5、SDXL和SD3），並且與現有的基於強化學習的擴散後訓練方法互補。項目頁面：https://jaayeon.github.io/AGSM
2605.30038.author: Jaa-Yeon Lee et.al.
2605.30038.authors: Jaa-Yeon Lee, Yeobin Hong, Taesung Kwon, Jong Chul Ye
